title: Phoenix LiveView Foundation
description: Full-stack Elixir/Phoenix LiveView application. Oban background jobs, Ecto/PostgreSQL, real-time PubSub, HEEx templates. SpotDL Spotify metadata integration, Python analyzer bridge. Phoenix built-in auth + Spotify OAuth.

title: Track Library + Download Pipeline
description: Download Spotify tracks via SpotDL. Track model with metadata (BPM, key, genre, bitrate). Oban-powered async download pipeline. Local file storage with relative paths for clean /files/... URLs. Batch download with Select All cross-page support.

title: Audio Analysis (Python)
description: librosa-powered Python analyzer bridge: BPM, key, MFCC, spectral centroid, beat tracking, chromagram. Results stored in AnalysisResult schema. 5 D3.js visualization hooks: AnalysisRadar, AnalysisChroma, AnalysisBeats, AnalysisMFCC, AnalysisSpectral.

title: Demucs Stem Separation
description: Local Demucs pipeline: htdemucs, htdemucs_ft, htdemucs_6s, mdx_extra models. 4-stem extraction (vocals, drums, bass, other). Oban-backed async processing. Pipeline tracker UI showing per-stage status.

title: Spotify OAuth + Playback SDK
description: Spotify Web Playback SDK integration with device handoff. OAuth flow with session token persistence. Local/Spotify playback toggle. Bitrate, codec, kHz metadata display for audiophile mode. SpotifyPlayer LiveComponent with WebSocket reconnection handling.

title: lalal.ai Cloud Stems
description: Cloud stem separation via lalal.ai REST API. 9 stem types: vocals, drums, bass, electric/acoustic guitar, piano, synth, strings, wind. 60s preview without full download. Engine toggle in settings (local Demucs vs cloud). Model comparison tooltips.

title: Admin Dashboard + SaaS Roles
description: 6-tier role hierarchy: user → pro → enterprise → admin → super_admin → platform_admin. Admin panel with user management, role promotion, quota controls. /platform/library for platform_admin access to all users' tracks. Revenue charts, user growth analytics.

title: Azure Container Apps Deployment
description: Production deployment on Azure Container Apps (Consumption plan). ACR remote amd64 builds (required for Apple Silicon). PostgreSQL 16 on Azure Flexible Server. GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline. Container App env with secrets from Key Vault. Auto-scaling, 0→N replicas.

title: MIDI/OSC Controller System
description: Phoenix LiveView MIDI UI at /midi. DeviceManager ETS with composite port IDs (input:N/output:N). Dispatcher GenServer in supervision tree. Action execution framework: play, stop, next_track, prev_track, bpm_tap, stem_volume, stem_solo, stem_mute. MIDI Learn 3-step inline workflow.

title: CrateDigger Spotify Integration
description: CrateDigger LiveView at /crate. Spotify playlist import, crate management (create/rename/delete), stem config per crate, track filtering. Context menu: Load in DJ/DAW/Pads, Download to Library, Re-download, View on Spotify. Track inspector with analysis overlay. Artwork thumbnails.

title: Multi-LLM Agent System
description: 6 specialist agents: MusicAnalyst, ChordAnalyst, BeatDetector, StemEngineer, MixingConsultant, SoundDesigner. Agent Orchestrator for multi-agent conversations. LLM adapter routing: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, local models. Health worker monitoring. 707 ExUnit tests. /ai chat interface.

title: Audio-to-MIDI + Piano Roll
description: basic-pitch integration for polyphonic audio-to-MIDI conversion. Chord detection via librosa chroma analysis. Interactive piano roll LiveComponent. Audio warping via pyrubberband. Auto-pipeline extensions for MIDI stage. Export MIDI files from browser.

title: DJ Dual-Deck Component
description: WaveSurfer waveform displays per deck. Transport controls, BPM, crossfader, EQ 3-band strips. Pitch control with reset. Deck A/B letter labels (ADR-004). Vertical channel faders with cap indicator. Crossfader with Lin/EQ-P/Sharp curve modes inline. Grid mode: BAR/BEAT/SUB/SMART.

title: Splice Integration + DrumKit
description: Splice-inspired DrumKit JSONB pads. Pure Elixir MIDI extractor. DrumGraph D3 XO scatter plot visualization. Drag-and-drop pad assignment from track library. DJ preset layouts with Rekordbox XML import. PianoRoll + ChordProgression D3 hooks.

title: DAW Tab Component
description: In-browser DAW with waveform editing. Timeline, loop regions, zoom/scroll. Stem mixer with per-stem volume/solo/mute. Multiple playhead modes. Annotation overlays. Integrated with AudioPlayerLive for local/Spotify routing. Real-time collaboration via PubSub.

title: Prototype Sandbox + DevTools
description: /prototype LiveView with Components|DevTools|UAT|LLM tabs. Floating DevTools overlay panel. UAT fixture/scenario helpers (runtime env guard). platform_admin + Mix.env :dev gate. Component previewer for HEEx components in isolation.

title: Docs Site (MkDocs Material)
description: 41-page MkDocs Material documentation site deployed to GitHub Pages. Built-in Mermaid + code highlighting. GitHub Actions CI. Architecture, guides, features, API, changelog, contributing sections. 191 internal links verified. Footer: 'Ported in part by Claude Code'.

title: AppHeader Universal Navigation
description: Sticky AppHeader LiveComponent shared across all LiveViews. Nav tabs: Library, Browse, DJ, DAW, Pads, Alchemy, Crate, Samples (new), MIDI, Practice. MIDI BPM/transport status display. Version badge v4.7.0. Scope-aware user display. Mobile-responsive with drawer.

title: SampleLibrary LiveView
description: New /samples route. Left sidebar: SamplePacks list with file counts. Search + BPM range + key + category filters. Streaming file table with mono font names. Play preview via SamplePreview JS hook. Always-visible play button (opacity-40, not hidden — ADR-004 pattern). BPM in cyan, key in purple.

title: Universal MIDI Controls
description: All LiveViews now subscribe to midi:actions PubSub. DashboardLive, CrateDiggerLive, SampleLibraryLive handle :play/:stop/:next_track/:prev_track uniformly. CrateDigger uses active_tracks() helper for context-aware next/prev navigation. SampleLibrary pushes preview events to JS hooks.

title: ADR-004 UX Overhaul
description: Design Decision Document aligned to Traktor/Serato/Rekordbox/VirtualDJ/Logic Pro standards. 10 decisions documented. Hot cue pads: 2×4 grid (grid-cols-4) with full color per letter (A=red, B=blue, C=green, D=yellow...). Empty pads show dimmed base color as affordance. Cue timestamps shown in pad.

title: CrateDigger BPM/Key Display
description: Track rows in CrateDigger now show analysis BPM and key inline — Rekordbox industry standard. BPM in cyan monospace, key in purple medium weight. Single load_analysis() call per row (no duplicate DB queries). Green analysis dot reuses same analysis result.

title: Comprehensive E2E Tests
description: Playwright test suite: full-pipeline.spec.ts (9 steps), dj-daw-midi.spec.ts (15 cases across DJ/DAW/MIDI), crate-sample-library.spec.ts (12 cases + nav consistency). Tests verify AppHeader presence on all routes, hot cue 2×4 grid, play button visibility, crossfader curve inline, MIDI device UI.

title: Changelog v1.0.0–v4.7.0
description: Complete CHANGELOG.md covering every version from v1.0.0 through v4.7.0-dev. Version jump select dropdown at top. All v4.2.x versions documented individually (v4.2.0–v4.2.12). Jekyll layout default.html updated with version selector in topbar navigation. CSS `.wiki-version-select` style added.

title: CCEM APM Hooks + Sessions
description: APM hooks at ~/.claude/hooks: session_init.sh registers SFA session at port 3032, pre_tool_use.sh fires skill tracking events. PostToolUse hooks for write/edit. toast notification on compile errors from log_watcher.sh. All fire-and-forget to avoid blocking development.

title: AgentLock Auth — Session Gate
description: session_init.sh now POSTs /api/v2/auth/sessions to formally create auth_sess_{SESSION_ID} at startup. Every subsequent tool call is bound to a real session in AgentLock's ETS store. Previously 0 active sessions were registered even during active tool use.

title: AgentLock Auth — Subagent Spawn Gate
description: subagent_start.sh now calls POST /api/v2/auth/authorize before writing the handoff JSON. Agent tool risk=low. Fail-open on 3s timeout. DENY → exit 2 blocks subagent launch. Full audit trail for every spawned agent in the AgentLock /authorization dashboard.

title: AgentLock Auth — MCP Tool Registry
description: 27 MCP tools registered with risk levels: mcp__playwright__*(8), mcp__agent-browser__*(7), mcp__chrome-devtools__*(6), mcp__linear-server__*(4). JS eval = HIGH, navigation/form = MEDIUM, read-only = LOW. Total: 47 tools, 40 requiring auth (85%).

title: Playlist Pipeline Alignment
description: Formation fmt-20260320-playlist-align: 11 stories, 4 waves. Music context get_track_by_spotify_id_with_status/1, list_playlist_tracks_with_status/1, track_pipeline_complete?/1. playlist_pipeline:{id} PubSub topic. Cross-playlist dedup. CrateDigger load_into_sfa fixed. Auto-resume incomplete pipelines. 15 ExUnit tests, all passing.

title: Showcase — AgentLock Pipeline SVG
description: GIMME-style showcase at localhost:3032/showcase/sfa. AgentLock auth pipeline SVG: hook chain → PolicyEngine → AuthorizationGate → TokenStore. Live-polling AgentLock panel: risk distribution bar, authorized/escalated/denied counters, active token count. 15s polling cadence.
